summary.shape_sentence: Early flush, sharp 09:45 reclaim, deeper mid-morning/midday washout, then controlled recovery into the shortened close.

goat.note: Sharp reversal from the morning flush into the 10:08 HOD.

red_circles.behavior: Bearish pivots formed at failed highs, especially near 25010 and later near 24980.

green_circles.behavior: Bullish pivots formed after downside exhaustion near 24910 and 24888.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply around 24980-25010 was respected; buyers failed to sustain above it.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand around 24888-24910 held and produced the main rebounds.

time_markers.10am_blue: Price was rallying strongly from the 09:45 low toward the eventual HOD.
time_markers.12pm_red: Price was stabilizing after the LOD and beginning a recovery attempt near 24940-24955.
time_markers.2pm_green: No 14:00 RTH continuation visible; session appears shortened.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: No 16:00 RTH print visible; active session ended around 13:00.

tags.banks_respected: lower demand near 24888-24910 and upper supply near 24980-25010
tags.banks_broken: opening support broke during the morning selloff

takeaway: Partial holiday-style session with early downside expansion, sharp bullish reversal, failed high, deeper midday washout, and a late recovery that could not fully reclaim upper supply.
